The '''Galney family''' was an important [[Hapan]] family from [[Terephon]]. Members included [[Galney (Lady)|Lady Galney]] and [[Galney (Ducha of Terephon)|Ducha Galney]]. The family was considered to be a staunch supporter of [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], and controlled the [[Galney fleet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
